errors.config: Firebase is not configured. Add keys to .env.local (see .env.example).
errors.invalidCredential: Incorrect email or password. If you don't have an account, sign up first.
errors.userNotFound: No account with this email. Sign up to create one.
errors.emailInUse: This email is already in use. Sign in instead.
errors.tooManyRequests: Too many attempts. Try again in a few minutes.
errors.popupBlocked: Google popup was blocked. Allow popups for 127.0.0.1, close any firebaseapp.com tab, reload the login page, and try again.
errors.providerDisabled: This sign-in method is not enabled in Firebase (Authentication → Sign-in method).
errors.unauthorizedDomain: This domain is not authorized. In Firebase → Authentication → Settings → Authorized domains, add "localhost" and "127.0.0.1" (no http or port).
errors.networkFailed: Network unavailable. Check your connection and try again.
errors.unavailable: Authentication service unavailable. Restart the dev server (npm run dev) after changing .env.local.
errors.googleRedirectTimeout: Google sign-in timed out. Click Cancel, then try the Google button again (popup) or use email sign-in.

llm.title: Your API key
llm.subtitle: Each account uses its own key. It is stored in your Firestore workspace (only you can read it) and powers Persona and post generation.
llm.privacyNote: Never share your key. You can revoke or rotate it anytime at your provider.

errors.keyTooShort: The API key looks too short. Make sure you copied the full key.
errors.invalidKey: This API key was rejected by the provider. Check that it is active and matches the selected service.
errors.saveFailed: Could not save the key. Try again.

inspirations.addedSuccess: Saved — you can add another below.
inspirations.duplicateUrl: This link is already in the list.
inspirations.maxReached: Maximum of 20 inspirations reached for this section.
inspirations.aspectsLabel: What I like about this link
inspirations.aspectsHint: Pick one or more traits, or explain why below.

inspirations.needAspectOrWhy: Select at least one trait or describe why you like this link.
inspirations.personaHint: After adding inspirations, regenerate your Persona to apply them:

guide.title: How to copy a LinkedIn link?
guide.postStep1: Open the post on LinkedIn (app or browser).
guide.postStep2: Click « … » (More) at the top right of the post.
guide.postStep4: Paste the URL here — it often starts with linkedin.com/posts/ or linkedin.com/feed/update/.
guide.profileStep2: Copy the URL from the address bar (linkedin.com/in/name).
guide.profileStep3: Paste the URL in the profile field below.
guide.tip: On mobile: share the post to « Copy link », or open the profile in the browser to copy the URL.

audience.title: Who you write for
audience.subtitle: A light sketch of your ideal reader — keep it simple.
audience.targetPlaceholder: e.g. French SMB leaders expanding internationally
audience.contentFocus: What to highlight in your content
audience.focusPlaceholder: Themes, angles, topics — not a service catalog
audience.optionalNote: All fields are optional — you can skip this step with nothing filled.
audience.emojiIntro: Default preference for future posts (you can adjust per article when refining).

persona.subtitle: This long prompt is your LinkedIn writing assistant. Generate it from your links and target, then edit and validate.
persona.generatingHint: The AI is analyzing your links and target. This may take 30–90 seconds.

gaps.subtitle: Answer these questions to refine your Persona and future LinkedIn posts. You can save partially and come back later.
gaps.saved: Profile and Persona updated — future generations will use this info.

persona.noLlmKey: Set up your API key before generating.
persona.invalidApiKey: Your API key was rejected by the provider. Update it in the API key step.
persona.loadFailed: Could not load the Persona page. Check your connection and try again.
persona.generateTimeout: Generation took too long (over 2 minutes). Try again.

history.title: Version history
history.subtitle: The 10 most recent prompt updates (up to 3 months). Restore an earlier version if an automatic update does not fit.
history.empty: No archived versions yet — history fills in when the Persona changes.
history.restoreConfirm: Replace the current Persona with the version from {date}? The current version will be archived too.

insights.title: Measurement loop → Persona
insights.subtitle: Synthesize what works on your published posts (signals entered after validation) to refine your Persona.
insights.generatingHint: AI compares your LinkedIn signals and suggests Persona updates (30–60 s).
insights.needSignals: Record at least one signal on a validated post (post detail page) before synthesizing.
insights.failed: Could not generate insights. Try again.
insights.noLlmKey: Configure your API key before synthesizing.
insights.invalidApiKey: API key rejected. Update it in API key setup.

articles.title: Sample posts
articles.descriptionPending: Drafts and posts being refined — not yet validated for LinkedIn.
articles.emptyPending: No pending posts. Generate a batch or view validated posts.
articles.needPersona: Validate your Persona before generating posts.
articles.description: Generate 3–4 LinkedIn posts, refine with guided questions, pick a CTA, and copy to LinkedIn.

news.title: News of the moment
news.subtitle: 4 stories from the last 7 days, matched to your domain. Pick one, then generate 4 LinkedIn drafts anchored on that story (with source citation).
news.empty: No recent news found. Try again or complete your profile.
news.noResults: No stories dated within the last 7 days for your domain. Try again later.
news.perplexityHint: For reliable web results, a Perplexity (Sonar) API key is recommended in Settings.
news.fullArticleHint: For the full published text, open the article on the source website.
news.pickOne: Select a news item before generating.
news.selectedTitle: Create your LinkedIn posts from this story
news.selectedExplain: The AI will draft 4 LinkedIn posts (2 generalist + 2 niche) reacting to this story in your voice and Persona — not a neutral press recap.
news.citationNote: Each post will cite the source with the full article URL (e.g. Source: BusinessEurope — https://…).
news.generateFromNews: Generate 4 LinkedIn posts from this story
news.generateFromNewsHint: 2 generalist + 2 niche posts · source citation required in every post.

articles.briefIncomplete: Complete the post brief (objective, problem, point of view, and proof) before generating.

brief.title: Batch brief
brief.subtitle: Steers all drafts toward your LinkedIn goal — each post will reflect problem, POV, and proof.
brief.problemPlaceholder: E.g. SMB exporters struggling to secure supply chains…
brief.pointOfViewPlaceholder: E.g. The real lever isn't price but end-to-end visibility…
brief.proofPlaceholder: E.g. client case, internal metric, field observation (required)
brief.incomplete: Enter at least 8 characters for problem, POV, and proof.

niche.title: Niche clarity
niche.warning: Brief is too generic — add sector, ICP, or proof before publishing.

feedback.brief_too_generic: This brief could target any professional on LinkedIn.
feedback.brief_niche_ok: Good specificity — the brief anchors identifiable expertise.
feedback.brief_could_be_sharper: OK, but a sector detail or metric would strengthen credibility.

suggestions.add_sector_or_metric: Add a sector, target role, or concrete metric.
suggestions.detail_problem: Detail the problem (who, where, when, business impact).

format.title: Format & distribution
format.subtitle: Recommended native LinkedIn format, carousel/video repurposing, and a first comment to seed discussion.
format.carouselHint: Consider a 5–7 slide carousel — generate the outline below, then visuals in Illustration.
format.repurposeHint: Same angle as the post: LinkedIn slide outline + 45–90s script.
format.firstCommentHint: Paste this as your first comment right after posting to seed qualified discussion.

slop.title: Generic phrasing (AI / LinkedIn style)
slop.intro: This panel flags wording everyone sees on LinkedIn and that AI tools often reuse (“game changer”, “excited to share”, numbered lessons, etc.). It is not an overall quality grade for your post — only a signal to make it more personal, concrete, and credible.
slop.howItWorks: The app compares your text to a built-in list of known patterns — instant analysis, no API key used. Scores update as soon as you edit the hook or body.
slop.humanScoreHelp: Higher (near 10/10) means fewer generic clichés detected — the post sounds more like a real person wrote it.
slop.slopScoreHelp: Higher (near 10/10) means more template-style phrases. Aim for 1–3 before you publish.
slop.guidanceClean: Good sign: keep going and add concrete proof (metric, case study, field observation) plus your personal angle.
slop.guidanceMild: Worth refining: replace flagged phrases with your own words, a lived example, or a more direct line.
slop.guidanceHeavy: Priority: rewrite generic passages — use Apply feedback or the LinkedIn Quality levers (more proof, more niche…).
slop.flagsHint: These are lines readers have already seen many times — rework them in your voice.
slop.warning: Many clichés detected: rewrite with more proof, a niche angle, and a voice that sounds like you before posting on LinkedIn.

summary.empty: Empty text — nothing to analyze yet.
summary.clean: Few generic phrases: tone feels fairly personal.
summary.mild_slop: Some typical LinkedIn / AI wording — rephrase to stand out.
summary.heavy_slop: Many generic phrases — a focused rewrite is recommended.

flags.at_end_of_day: At the end of the day

quality.title: LinkedIn quality
quality.subtitle: Scores and levers for credible, niche, conversational posts.
quality.linkWarning: An external link appears in the post body. LinkedIn often reduces reach — prefer putting it in a comment.
quality.revisingHint: AI is applying the selected lever (30–60 s).

articles.generatingHint: AI is writing 4 posts from your Persona (30–90 s).
articles.noLlmKey: Set up your API key before generating.
articles.invalidApiKey: API key rejected. Update it in API key step.

cta.title: Choose your CTA
cta.subtitle: 3 suggestions aligned with the brief objective (conversation, save, leads…) — pick intensity.
cta.loadFailed: Could not generate CTAs. Try again.
cta.pickOne: Select a CTA (soft, medium, or pushy).

illustration.title: LinkedIn illustration
illustration.subtitle: Recommended visual type for this post + 3 short prompts to copy.
illustration.loading: Analyzing the post for visual ideas…
illustration.promptsHint: Paste a prompt into DALL·E, Midjourney, Ideogram, Adobe Firefly, or a stock site.

articles.scopeMix: {generalist, plural, one {# generalist post} other {# generalist posts}} · {niche, plural, one {# niche post} other {# niche posts}}

hint.default: Tone aligned with your Persona — balanced and professional.
hint.corrosive: Challenges a received idea or an "obvious" angle (including news). Forbidden: insults, politics, racism — even as humor.

refinement.title: Refine this post
refinement.tone: Does the tone match your voice?
refinement.theme: Does the theme / angle work for you?
refinement.length: Is the length right for LinkedIn?
refinement.currentNews: Make this post more aligned with current news?
refinement.currentNewsDetailPlaceholder: Details: headline, topic, or URL for the AI to use

detail.reviseFailedHint: Check your API key (Settings), wait 30–60 s, or shorten the global comment. Use Apply feedback in Refine — not Validate.
detail.needRefinement: Answer at least one question, enable contrarian tone, add a comment, or provide news details if you choose Yes.
detail.validateFailedHint: Pick a CTA, check your API key, then try again. Validation prepares the LinkedIn copy (hashtags + export) without rewriting the whole post.
detail.ctaOrCreate: Pick an existing CTA or create one:
detail.validatingHint: Generating hashtags and preparing LinkedIn text (10–30 s).
detail.revisingHint: AI is applying your feedback to the post (20–60 s).
detail.hashtagsHint: 4 LinkedIn hashtags will be appended at the end (content + profile) when you validate.
detail.copyLinkedInHint: Text is on your clipboard. If LinkedIn’s composer is empty, paste with Ctrl+V (Cmd+V on Mac). Auto-publishing requires a LinkedIn connection (coming later).
detail.copyFailed: Could not copy. Allow clipboard access or copy the text manually.
detail.newsAnchor: Batch generated from this news story

share.title: SHARE
share.hint: Send this post to a colleague by email or WhatsApp. The Ultra Content Maker mention is added for sharing only (not in the LinkedIn copy).

news.title: Previous news
news.subtitle: Stories archived from your posts page — browse details or regenerate 2 posts (brief is set on the posts page).
news.briefOnArticles: Set up the brief on the posts page →
news.empty: No archived news yet. Fetch news from the posts page first.
news.pickOne: Select a news story before generating.
news.generateFromNewsHint: 1 generalist + 1 niche post, both anchored on this news.
news.generatingHint: AI is writing 2 posts from your Persona (30–60 s).
